records.question: Which events held at Marathon on 13 October 2008 had an attendance of at least 6650 and were covered by journalists with exactly 3 years of experience writing Screening reports?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id
WHERE journalist.years_working = 3 AND event.date = '13 October 2008' AND event.venue = 'Marathon' AND event.event_attendance >= 6650 AND news_report.work_type = 'Screening'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.Event_ID
FROM event e
JOIN news_report nr ON e.Event_ID = nr.Event_ID
JOIN journalist j ON nr.journalist_ID = j.journalist_ID
WHERE e.Venue = 'Marathon'
AND e.Date = '13 October 2008'
AND e.Event_Attendance >= 6650
AND j.Years_working = 3
AND nr.Work_Type = 'Screening'

records.question: Which events had an attendance of at most 1675 people?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
WHERE event.event_attendance <= 1675

records.question: Which events have exactly 225 attendees?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
WHERE event.event_attendance = 225

records.question: Which Special Exhibition events held at Hispano on 9 April 2014 had an attendance of at least 225?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
WHERE event.name = 'Special Exhibition' AND event.date = '9 April 2014' AND event.event_attendance >= 225 AND event.venue = 'Hispano'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT event.Event_ID
FROM event
WHERE event.Name = 'Special Exhibition'
AND event.Venue = 'Hispano'
AND event.Date = '9 April 2014'
AND event.Event_Attendance >= 225

records.question: What events held at Victoria on 11 October 2007 had an attendance of at least 369?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
WHERE event.event_attendance >= 369 AND event.venue = 'Victoria' AND event.date = '11 October 2007'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT event.Event_ID
FROM event
WHERE event.Venue = 'Victoria'
AND event.Date = '11 October 2007'
AND event.Event_Attendance >= 369

records.question: Which events on 11 October 2007 had no more than 369 attendees and were associated with news reports where the work_type is Music?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
WHERE news_report.work_type = 'Music' AND event.event_attendance <= 369 AND event.date = '11 October 2007'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.Event_ID
FROM event e
INNER JOIN news_report nr ON e.Event_ID = nr.Event_ID
WHERE e.Date = '11 October 2007'
AND e.Event_Attendance <= 369
AND nr.Work_Type = 'Music'

records.question: Which events took place where the venue is Motagua and have related news reports?

SELECT event.event_id FROM event

records.pred_sql:

FROM event e

WHERE e.Venue = 'Motagua'

records.question: What events reported in the news occurred exactly on 13 October 2008?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
WHERE event.date = '13 October 2008'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.Event_ID
FROM event e
INNER JOIN news_report nr ON e.Event_ID = nr.Event_ID
WHERE e.Date = '13 October 2008'

records.question: Which events were covered in Screening reports where the journalist’s name is Herbert Swindells?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id
WHERE journalist.name = 'Herbert Swindells' AND news_report.work_type = 'Screening'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT e.Event_ID
FROM event e
JOIN news_report nr ON e.Event_ID = nr.Event_ID
JOIN journalist j ON nr.journalist_ID = j.journalist_ID
WHERE j.Name = 'Herbert Swindells' AND nr.Work_Type = 'Screening'

records.question: Which Government Hearing events on 11 October 2007 had no more than 369 attendees and were covered by Jackie Waring, a journalist with at most 21 years working, writing music reports?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id
WHERE event.event_attendance <= 369 AND event.name = 'Government Hearing' AND event.date = '11 October 2007' AND journalist.years_working <= 21 AND news_report.work_type = 'Music' AND journalist.name = 'Jackie Waring'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT e.Event_ID
FROM event e
JOIN news_report nr ON e.Event_ID = nr.Event_ID
JOIN journalist j ON nr.journalist_ID = j.journalist_ID
WHERE e.Name = 'Government Hearing'
AND e.Date = '11 October 2007'
AND e.Event_Attendance <= 369
AND j.Name = 'Jackie Waring'
AND j.Years_working <= 21
AND nr.Work_Type = 'music reports'
